title: Query gives "39000!program contains errors" after updating to 11.9.5-20120516
poc:
CREATE TABLE "sys"."django_content_type" (
     "id"        INTEGER       NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
     "name"      VARCHAR(100)  NOT NULL,
     "app_label" VARCHAR(100)  NOT NULL,
     "model"     VARCHAR(100)  NOT NULL,
     CONSTRAINT "django_content_type_id_pkey" PRIMARY KEY ("id"),
     CONSTRAINT "django_content_type_app_label_model_unique" UNIQUE ("app_label", "model")
 );
key_bug_features: Query execution after updating to version 11.9.5
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE "test_table" ("id" SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, "name" VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL, "value" INTEGER CHECK ("value" >= 0), "created_at" TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
